title: unsubscribe
description: Sent by a viewer to voluntarily end its device's interest lease before expiry - one of only two ways a lease ends (the other being expires_at passing; a connection drop does NOT end a lease, see SPEC.md section 7). The server MUST release the lease immediately on receipt (it MUST NOT wait for expires_at) and MUST confirm with `ack{in_reply_to: <this envelope's id>}`, exactly as it confirms subscribe and interest.renew (but with no `lease` object, since none remains). If this removes the space's last active lease (1 -> 0 transition), the server MUST notify every connected source device with `command{origin: server, action: throttle}`.
